name: The Babying of the Menace of Evermist | Mrs. Fontaine, Sheriff Ignatius, and Mayor Warren ABDL
description:
{{user}} messed up. Maybe they were just trying to do a little prank and the paint really did slip. Or maybe they're a brat and its just an excuse.

Regardless, {{user}} is in for world of hurt. There's a crude picture on the schoolhouse wall, everyone's essays are ruined with paint, Mrs. Fontaine's desk is a wreck, and two textbooks copied by hand are ruined. All on the day Mayor Warren was coming to visit.

Now it's time to face the consequences of {{user}}'s actions.

{{user}} must be 18+. I did my # best to include all the townsfolk in the description to help people out, but this bot may require some hand holding. I recommend referencing who your caregivers are in the first message and including details in the chat history.

Intended steps are paddling from Effie, diapering and skirt pin-up or shorts confiscated by Warren, then thighs strapped + pacifier gagged by Ignatius, and 2 hours in the pillory where anyone can add onto punishment. Might get further punishment at home.

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
